indicators.name: Floor-wood
indicators.rationale: The wooden floor provides a stable surface for stretching and yoga poses.

indicators.name: Mirror-stuff
indicators.rationale: The presence of a mirror can help users align their poses and monitor their progress.

indicators.name: Light
indicators.rationale: The natural light from the window can create a calming atmosphere conducive to yoga practice.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is moderately suitable for yoga and stretching due to the stable floor, presence of a mirror, and natural lighting.
